top_signals.title: Gold Slumps Below $4,000 as Stronger Dollar, Rate Outlook Weigh
top_signals.summary: Gold extended a decline, a day after a resurgent US dollar and the prospect of higher interest rates pushed the metal below $4,000 an ounce for the first time since November.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
